status: executed and closed through Gate 58 on main
global_rules: One branch per gate; merge to main only after the gate is green.
Gate 56 must pass before Gate 57 may start.
Gate 57 may make DMP v2 canonical, but may not fully retire v1 in the same gate.
Gate 58 may not begin until Gate 57 is merged and any surviving v1 usage is explicitly compatibility-only.
Normative docs, guardrails, AGENTS guidance, and planning docs must agree on what is canonical, compatibility-only, and archived.
If Gate 56 finds DMP v2 is not future-proof, promotion is blocked until the bounded defects are resolved.

gates.title: DMP v2 readiness / future-proof / governance audit

leaves.title: Inventory all DMP v1/v2 producer and consumer surfaces
leaves.purpose: Produce an authoritative map of live v1 producers, live v2 producers, v2-upgraded surfaces, v1 consumers, v2 consumers, and mixed-mode helpers.
validation: Evidence note with file paths and exact producer/consumer classification
Targeted pytest for DMP protocol surfaces if any test names change

leaves.title: Audit DMP v2 envelope and block model for future-proofing
leaves.purpose: Prove that the current v2 envelope and block types can carry the post-Gate-55 workflow, including Step 0 routing, hierarchy lineage, carry handoff, review traceability, and foreseeable near-term modules without a DMP v3 redesign.
validation: Future-proof audit note with explicit pass/fail verdict
Targeted tests covering any schema clarifications

leaves.title: Audit normative docs, guardrails, AGENTS, and planning surfaces for DMP coherence
leaves.purpose: Remove ambiguity across docs/01-05, AGENTS.md, DMP specs, workflow notes, and execution-control docs so they agree on what is live, what is compatibility-only, and what is archived.
must_not_touch: Runtime code except for docstring alignment if strictly necessary
validation: Normative coherence note with explicit contradictions resolved

leaves.title: Archive or stub legacy planning artefacts with authoritative pointers
leaves.purpose: Move stale planning artefacts out of the active path while preserving truthful stubs/pointers so no historical context is lost.
must_not_touch: Active canonical control surfaces without explicit justification

leaves.title: Emit readiness verdict and Gate 57/58 exact pass criteria
leaves.purpose: Freeze a promotion-ready or promotion-blocked verdict, plus exact Gate 57 and Gate 58 entry/exit criteria.

leaves.title: Rewrite runtime stage packet producer path to native v2
leaves.purpose: Stop canonical runtime packet production from depending on 'emit v1 then upgrade' behaviour.
must_not_touch: Carry semantics unrelated to packet production
Playbook hierarchy semantics unrelated to packet production
validation: Parity note showing native v2 production path

leaves.title: Promote imported-module and ancillary packet emission to v2-first
leaves.purpose: Ensure imported-module packet and any ancillary packet surfaces treat v2 as canonical, not derived.

leaves.title: Migrate canonical fixtures, API/replay readers, and docs to v2
leaves.purpose: Make v2 the default packet contract in fixtures, API/replay-facing surfaces, and authoritative docs.
must_not_touch: Historical archives except for truthful stubs/pointers
validation: Docs reflect v2 as canonical producer

leaves.title: Constrain any surviving v1 usage to explicit compatibility-only shims
leaves.purpose: If any v1 consumer cannot be removed inside Gate 57, confine it to a minimal, named compatibility shim with retirement criteria.
must_not_touch: Reintroduction of v1 as canonical producer
validation: No hidden mixed-mode producer path remains

leaves.title: Prove canonical v2 promotion with full matrix and dependency-heavy validation
leaves.purpose: Run the full matrix plus backend/dependency-heavy checks to prove v2 is the canonical live producer surface and Gate 58 is safe to begin.
must_not_touch: Runtime semantics except for fixes required by failing validation

gates.title: DMP v1 retirement and mixed-mode cleanup

leaves.title: Remove v1 producer codepaths and temporary adapters
leaves.purpose: Delete any remaining v1 producer path and any temporary adapter no longer justified after Gate 57.
must_not_touch: Canonical v2 producer semantics except as required by cleanup
validation: No runtime producer path emits v1

leaves.title: Retire v1-only fixtures, tests, and docs
leaves.purpose: Archive or remove v1-only support artefacts once they no longer serve a live compatibility role.
validation: No stale claim that v1 remains live

leaves.title: Close mixed-mode wording and archive obsolete DMP v1 planning surfaces
leaves.purpose: Ensure normative/planning/agent docs describe one surviving canonical DMP surface and archive obsolete mixed-mode notes with pointers.
must_not_touch: Non-DMP architecture decisions unrelated to retirement

leaves.title: Prove zero meaningful v1 dependency remains
leaves.purpose: Run full validation and emit a retirement receipt showing the repo no longer meaningfully depends on DMP v1.
must_not_touch: Runtime semantics except for fixes revealed by validation
